ignoreValues.reason: Design-locked signature motion token for the Notion-hybrid editor (docs/design/notion-hybrid-editor.md): --ed-spring is the intentional 'snaps into place' confirm-motion, reduced-motion gated, reserved for placement confirmation only (hover uses non-overshoot --ed-ease-out).
Definition of the design-locked --ed-spring token (see docs/design/notion-hybrid-editor.md motion tokens).
